final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-style Chinese infographic for a traditional Chinese minority ethnic costume.

Style/medium: needs a national museum exhibition panel aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the fixed five-zone layout: top header (title + subtitle + intro), left structural breakdown zone with Chinese callout lines and detail close-ups, upper-right material/texture zone with real fabric swatches and descriptions, middle-right pattern/color/symbolism zone with color palette swatches and cultural explanations, bottom wearing sequence flowchart + core characteristics summary
Subject: must include one representative Chinese minority ethnic costume (automatically selected by the model based on visual richness for infographic treatment — exact ethnic group choice is yours), with full-figure human subject in authentic standing pose as central visual anchor
Scene/backdrop: must be textured paper background in off-white, silk-white, or pale tea tones — exact paper texture treatment is yours
Lighting/medium: needs a museum display lighting atmosphere — exact light source positioning is yours
Color palette: needs a refined, restrained, professional palette suitable for collectible cultural documentation — exact color mixing is yours
Materials/textures: must include realistic fabric textures (embroidery, batik, brocade, silver ornaments) with authentic material differentiation
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text in Simplified Chinese only: 主标题 / 副标题 / 导语 / 部件中文引线标注 / 材质说明 / 纹样寓意 / 色彩含义 / 穿着顺序 / 核心特征总结 — all text must be clear, regular, and readable
Constraints: must preserve the encyclopedic/collection-worthy tone, avoid poster/studio/e-commerce/anime/cosplay aesthetics, must show real structural details and material differences, must maintain infographic format with all five zones visible
Avoid: must avoid poster aesthetic, studio photography feel, e-commerce look, anime style, cosplay vibe, messy annotations, incorrect structures, illegible text, fake materials, excessive decoration
